name: The Big Guns
description: This model gains the following action:

granted_actions.name: Rocket Launcher
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. This action does not deal extra damage from raises.
granted_actions.effects: Models within (M)1" of the target must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or be dealt 2 damage. Increase this (M) by +2" for each raise this action receives.

triggers.name: "I'm Out!"
triggers.text: This trigger must be declared if able. Discard this upgrade.

extraction_notes: The 'I'm Out!' trigger has a skull icon indicating mandatory status.
The (M) notation in the effects text refers to (melee) range type, indicating area of effect measurement.
The limitations section shows a dash, indicating no special limitations apply to this upgrade.
